rationale: The user requested a premium AI beauty experience, modern iOS-level aesthetics, glassmorphism, gradient lighting, and high-end typography. The Jewel & Luxury archetype perfectly aligns with this context, emphasizing cinematic and moody visuals over standard app layouts.

buttons.primary: Gradient background (#F3D088 to #D1A354), text color black, full rounded, generous padding (e.g., 64px width / 16px vertical)
buttons.secondary: Transparent background, white/20 border, white text, full rounded
buttons.ghost: Transparent background, zinc-400 text, no border

cards.glass: Background white/5, border white/10, rounded 24px, padding 24px (used with Expo BlurView)

inputs.default: Background #141414, border white/10, rounded 16px, padding 16px, text white

accessibility.contrast: Text must maintain at least 4.5:1 against backgrounds.
accessibility.focus: Focus states not typical in mobile, but provide active opacity feedback on buttons.
accessibility.testId_convention: All interactive elements MUST use data-testid in kebab-case mapped to React Native testID prop, e.g., 'submit-analysis-button'.

images.description: Abstract golden background for splash screen or paywall backdrop.
Close up of a woman with her eyes closed, ideal for showing face analysis mesh overlay.
Smiling Asian woman with radiant clear skin for after-treatment preview.
Close-up of a woman with natural beauty, good for non-surgical result example.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React Native Expo application, NOT a web app. Ensure all designs are translated into StyleSheet objects or NativeWind classes (if setup).
For typography, ensure fonts 'Outfit' (body) and 'Cormorant Garamond' (headings) are loaded via expo-font. Map sizes accordingly.
For Glassmorphism, utilize `expo-blur` or `@react-native-community/blur` wrapped around semi-transparent views.
Always apply `testID` prop on touchables/inputs using the `data-testid` convention specified (kebab-case).
Turkish is primary language. Provide English toggle. Texts should be dynamically loaded or managed via state.
Ensure 'Before/After' slider is built utilizing a pan responder (or react-native-gesture-handler) overlapping the original and modified images.
